# terrible_community_general_scaleway_private_network (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `project` (String) Project identifier.
- `region` (String) Scaleway region to use (for example `par1`).

### Optional

- `name` (String) Name of the VPC.
- `state` (String) Indicate desired state of the VPC.
- `tags` (String) List of tags to apply to the instance.

### Read-Only

- `scaleway_private_network` (String) Information on the VPC.
